# Vendored UI/UX and Animation Assets

- `motion.js` is a local ESM entry for Motion `12.23.13`, with its browser dependencies vendored beside it so the site can run as a static page.
- `ui-ux-pro-max-skill/` is the downloaded UI UX Pro Max repository. Its design-system script was used to guide the polish pass for this portfolio.

The project also keeps `motion` in `package.json` so a future npm-based build can install the same dependency normally.
